working_on: Routine task P5-08: Philosophy of language seed — twelfth routine-mode session against T-PHASE-5; depends_on [P5-01a] satisfied since S-0051 (P5-01a's verifier-column fix closed). declared_scope: Author product/seed-graph/migrations/0070_seed_language_part1.sql with the analytic-tradition core of philosophy of language at the granularity principle. Eight coverage clusters: foundation (philosophy_of_language, meaning, reference, sense_and_reference — Frege 1892, proposition); reference and names (proper_name, descriptivism, causal_theory_of_reference — Kripke 1972 / Putnam 1975, rigid_designator, definite_description, russells_theory_of_descriptions — Russell 1905); meaning theories (truth_conditional_semantics — Davidson 1967, use_theory_of_meaning — Wittgenstein PI, verificationism, compositionality_semantic); speech acts and Gricean pragmatics (speech_act — Austin/Searle, performative_utterance — Austin 1955, gricean_maxims — Grice 1975, conversational_implicature, presupposition — Strawson/Stalnaker); externalism (semantic_externalism — Putnam 1975/Burge 1979, twin_earth, narrow_content); indexicality and context (indexical, character_and_content — Kaplan 1989); truth in language (deflationary_theory_of_truth, tarskis_t_schema — Tarski 1933); adjacent (linguistic_relativity — Sapir-Whorf as the philosophically loaded edge case). ~28 nodes total, ~35 within-domain pedagogical_prerequisite edges in a layered DAG rooted at philosophy_of_language. Append per-session narrative entry to product/seed-graph/migrations/ROUTING.md. Apply migration via engine/tools/apply_migration.py wrapper per ADR 0055. Confidence_level composition target: 100% INTERPRETED. PREDICATE_MANIFEST.md not edited (only pedagogical_prerequisite). Cross-domain edges deferred to P5-11 per phase_5.md T2-G #1 (causal_theory_of_reference ↔ metaphysics on natural kinds; semantic_externalism ↔ philosophy of mind on content externalism, ↔ epistemology on self-knowledge asymmetry; speech_act/conversational_implicature ↔ political philosophy on hate-speech and silencing; tarskis_t_schema ↔ logic; indexical ↔ philosophy of mind on de se attitudes). Two-commit pattern. End state: P5-08 complete in auto_target.json; check_target.py --task-id P5-08 passes both criteria (migration_applied + validate_passes). graph_version 12→13. Sub-range slots 0071-0079 left reserved. phase: P_5
